response.overview: Momono Marina, the 37-year-old former race queen who had a massive breakout hit about 10 years ago, has returned to the spotlight as a married woman. Her unique J-cup bust and beautiful legs are still as stunning as ever. Her overflowing mature sex appeal has only intensified. Now an even more beautiful woman, she may be at her peak right now. But even she was troubled by a sexless marriage. Six years into her marriage, she, who had remained devoted to her husband, experiences extramarital sex for the first time. Her beautiful face... her beautiful body... contorts in lust as she becomes engrossed in pleasure, looking like a beast that has lost all reason.
